nasb.text: and he shall lay his hand on its head and slay it before the tent of meeting, and the sons of Aaron shall sprinkle its blood around on the altar.

esv.text: and lay his hand on its head and kill it in front of the tent of meeting, and the sons of Aaron shall throw its blood against the sides of the altar.

cnv.text: 按手在羊頭上，然後在會幕門口宰殺牠；亞倫的子孫要把血潑在祭壇的四周，

ccb.text: 将手放在羊头上，在会幕门口宰杀。祭司要把羊血洒在祭坛四周。
